name: Commerce Product Playbook
description: Conversion-focused product set balancing premium studio polish with contextual in-use storytelling.

promptStyle.base: commercial product photography, controlled softbox lighting, crisp silhouette edges, tactile material detail, premium ecommerce finish
promptStyle.neg: cluttered set design, distorted geometry, muddy focus, artificial text overlays, noisy low-light artifacts

shotList: hero product shot with clean negative space
